transcript: Speaker A: माझा हात पकड [Hold my hand] Speaker B: Hold my hand. Speaker A: लवकर कर [Hurry up] Speaker B: Hurry up. Speaker A: हळू कर [Slow down] Speaker B: Slow down. Speaker A: माझ्याकडे बघ [Look at me] Speaker B: Look at me. Speaker A: माझ्याकडे बघू नकोस [Don't look at me] Speaker B: Don't look at me. Speaker A: मला माहित नाही [I don't know] Speaker B: I don't know. बट आता I know English कारण तुझ्याशी बोलून बोलून माझं English खूप improve झालं आहे. Thank you. [But now I know English because speaking with you has improved my English a lot. Thank you.] Speaker A: MySivi app वर अशाच माझ्यासोबत मराठीत बोलून English शिका ते पण फक्त एक रुपयात. माझ्यासोबत कधीही कितीही वेळ प्रॅक्टिस करा. बोलणं, ग्रामर, सेंटेन्सेस, योग्य शब्द वापरणं, सगळं एका ठिकाणी. [Learn English by speaking with me in Marathi on the MySivi app, that too for just one rupee. Practice with me anytime, for as long as you want. Speaking, grammar, sentences, using the right words, all in one place.]
on_screen_text: माझा हात पकड [Hold my hand], लवकर कर [Hurry up], हळू कर [Slow down], माझ्याकडे बघ [Look at me], माझ्याकडे बघू नकोस [Don't look at me], मला माहित नाही [I don't know], बट आता I know English कारण तुझ्याशी बोलून बोलून माझी English खूप improve झाली आहे Thank you [But now I know English because speaking with you has improved my English a lot Thank you], MySivi, MySivi app वर अशाच माझ्यासोबत मराठीत बोलून English शिका ते पण फक्त एक रुपयात [Learn English by speaking with me in Marathi on the MySivi app, that too for just one rupee], Sale Ends Today, सगळं UNLOCK करा [Unlock everything], ३ दिवसांसाठी ₹३० ₹१ OFFER [3 days for ₹30 ₹1 OFFER], त्यानंतर ₹२९९/महिना कधीही Cancel करू शकता [After that ₹299/month, cancel anytime], MySivi Pro फायदे [MySivi Pro benefits], २४/७ तुमचा Personal AI English Teacher [24/7 your Personal AI English Teacher], तुमचं grammar correct होईल instant feedback सोबत [Your grammar will be corrected with instant feedback], Offer ends in 09:58, Pay Using PhonePe, Start Trial at ₹1, माझ्यासोबत कधीही कितीही वेळ प्रॅक्टिस करा [Practice with me anytime, for as long as you want], बोलणे ग्रामर सेंटेन्सेस योग्य शब्द वापरणं सगळं एका ठिकाणी [Speaking, grammar, sentences, using the right words, all in one place], MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An AI avatar guides a Marathi-speaking woman through English translations in a split-screen format. The woman expresses gratitude for how the app has improved her English speaking skills. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the MySivi app, highlighting a 3-day trial offer for just ₹1.
